relationshipTypes.label: Supersedes
relationshipTypes.description: This replaces an outdated understanding

relationshipTypes.label: Contradicts
relationshipTypes.description: This challenges an existing belief

relationshipTypes.label: Supports
relationshipTypes.description: This provides evidence for a claim

relationshipTypes.label: Causes
relationshipTypes.description: This was caused by another event

relationshipTypes.label: Influenced By
relationshipTypes.description: This was shaped by a contributing factor

relationshipTypes.label: Parent Of
relationshipTypes.description: This encompasses a more specific concept

relationshipTypes.label: Child Of
relationshipTypes.description: This is a subset of a broader concept

relationshipTypes.label: Sibling Of
relationshipTypes.description: This parallels a related concept at the same level

relationshipTypes.label: Updates
relationshipTypes.description: This modifies existing knowledge

relationshipTypes.label: Evolution Of
relationshipTypes.description: This develops from an earlier concept

relationshipTypes.label: Prerequisite For
relationshipTypes.description: Understanding this is required for the next concept

relationshipTypes.label: Implements
relationshipTypes.description: This applies a theoretical concept

relationshipTypes.label: Documents
relationshipTypes.description: This describes a system or process

relationshipTypes.label: Example Of
relationshipTypes.description: This demonstrates a general principle

relationshipTypes.label: Tests
relationshipTypes.description: This validates an implementation or hypothesis

relationshipTypes.label: Responds To
relationshipTypes.description: This answers a previous question or statement

relationshipTypes.label: References
relationshipTypes.description: This cites source material

relationshipTypes.label: Inspired By
relationshipTypes.description: This was motivated by earlier work

relationshipTypes.label: Follows
relationshipTypes.description: This comes after a previous step

relationshipTypes.label: Precedes
relationshipTypes.description: This comes before a next step

relationshipTypes.label: Depends On
relationshipTypes.description: This requires a prerequisite

relationshipTypes.label: Composed Of
relationshipTypes.description: This contains component parts

relationshipTypes.label: Part Of
relationshipTypes.description: This belongs to a larger whole

relationshipTypes.label: Disputes
relationshipTypes.description: This disagrees with another perspective

relationshipTypes.label: Quotes
relationshipTypes.description: NT passage directly quoting OT text

relationshipTypes.label: Fulfills
relationshipTypes.description: NT event/person fulfilling OT prophecy or type

relationshipTypes.label: Alludes To
relationshipTypes.description: Indirect reference or thematic echo of another passage

relationshipTypes.label: Parallels
relationshipTypes.description: Parallel account or closely related passage

relationshipTypes.label: Typology Of
relationshipTypes.description: OT person/event prefiguring NT reality

relationshipTypes.label: Contrasts With
relationshipTypes.description: Deliberate contrast between passages (e.g., Adam vs Christ)

relationshipTypes.label: Elaborates
relationshipTypes.description: Expands or develops a theme from another passage

relationshipTypes.label: Lexical Link
relationshipTypes.description: Connected by shared Hebrew/Greek root word or Strong's number

relationshipTypes.label: Concept Of
relationshipTypes.description: Links a passage to a theological concept note

relationshipTypes.label: Book Of
relationshipTypes.description: Chapter belongs to this book
